$uid..validate: newData.hasChildren(['score', 'updatedAt']) && newData.child('score').isNumber() && newData.child('score').val() >= 0 && newData.child('score').val() <= 999999999 && newData.child('updatedAt').isNumber() && (!newData.hasChild('displayName') || newData.child('displayName').isString()) && (!newData.hasChild('bestCombo') || newData.child('bestCombo').isNumber())

$id..write: auth != null && (data.child('fromUid').val() == auth.uid || data.child('toUid').val() == auth.uid || (!data.exists() && newData.child('fromUid').val() == auth.uid))

$code..write: auth != null && newData.child('uid').val() == auth.uid && (!data.exists() || data.child('uid').val() == auth.uid)
